articles.title: Healey refuses to alter RMV policy that denies undercover license plates to ICE
articles.description:

summary: Healey maintains RMV policy denying undercover plates to ICE, ensuring local compliance with state laws.

articles.title: Body of Quincy kayaker pulled from Boston Harbor
articles.description:

summary: Authorities recovered the body of 72-year-old Tri Trinh from Boston Harbor.

This incident raises safety concerns for local kayakers in Boston Harbor.

articles.title: ‘If you earn an A, you deserve the A’: Readers react to Harvard’s proposed grade cap
articles.description:

summary: Harvard University is considering a cap on A grades to address grading fairness.
